lines.text: Golf Cart Rental | Walt Disney World Resort
Explore Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort & Campground on an electric golf cart, available from Reception Outpost.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Get around with ease when you rent an electric golf cart. Available for pickup at 1:00 PM, golf carts must be returned by 11:00 AM on the return date.
Equipped with windshields and headlights for night driving, rentals are available to Guests 18 years of age and older with a valid driver license.
Drivers must be 16 years of age and older with a valid driver license, and all drivers must have their license on them when operating the cart.
Pricing is $75 to $100 per day, tax included.

Advance reservations are highly recommended at The Campsites at Disney’s Fort Wilderness Resort and can be made starting one year prior to your visit by calling (407) 824-2742. Guests younger than 18 years of age must have parent or guardian permission to call. Unreserved golf carts may be available for rental on a first-come, first-serve basis.
Once you’ve arrived, you can visit the Outpost to pick up your golf cart.
Golf carts are welcome, but for the safety of everyone at the Resort hotel, you must be prepared to present proof of insurance upon check-in and sign an agreement and waiver.
Third-party golf cart companies may not conduct business on Walt Disney World Resort property.
